metadata.site_description: A live dbdocs site built from the jaffle_shop dbt project

nodes.description: Product (food and drink items that can be ordered) data with basic cleaning and transformation applied, one row per product.
nodes.label: stg_products
nodes.name: stg_products

nodes.description: Customer data with basic cleaning and transformation applied, one row per customer.
nodes.label: stg_customers
nodes.name: stg_customers

nodes.description:
List of our supply expenses data with basic cleaning and transformation applied.
One row per supply cost, not per supply. As supply costs fluctuate they receive a new row with a new UUID. Thus there can be multiple rows per supply_id.
nodes.label: stg_supplies
nodes.name: stg_supplies

nodes.description: Order data with basic cleaning and transformation applied, one row per order.
nodes.label: stg_orders
nodes.name: stg_orders

nodes.description: Individual food and drink items that make up our orders, one row per item.
nodes.label: stg_order_items
nodes.name: stg_order_items

nodes.description: List of open locations with basic cleaning and transformation applied, one row per location.
nodes.label: stg_locations
nodes.name: stg_locations

nodes.description: Customer dimension with segment classification. One row per customer per segment code (composite grain).
nodes.label: dim_customer_segment
nodes.name: dim_customer_segment

nodes.description: Customer overview data mart, offering key details for each unique customer. One row per customer.
nodes.label: customers
nodes.name: customers

nodes.description: Fact table joining orders to their customer segment at time of order. One row per order.
nodes.label: fct_customer_segment_orders
nodes.name: fct_customer_segment_orders

nodes.description: Order overview data mart, offering key details for each order inlcluding if it's a customer's first order and a food vs. drink item breakdown. One row per order.
nodes.label: orders
nodes.name: orders

nodes.description: Time spine table for MetricFlow, one row per day.
nodes.label: metricflow_time_spine
nodes.name: metricflow_time_spine

nodes.description: Location overview data mart. One row per location.
nodes.label: locations
nodes.name: locations

nodes.description: One record per person who has purchased one or more items
nodes.label: raw_customers
nodes.name: raw_customers

nodes.description: One record per order (consisting of one or more order items)
nodes.label: raw_orders
nodes.name: raw_orders

nodes.description: Items included in an order
nodes.label: raw_items
nodes.name: raw_items

nodes.description: One record per SKU for items sold in stores
nodes.label: raw_products
nodes.name: raw_products

nodes.description: One record per supply per SKU of items sold in stores
nodes.label: raw_supplies
nodes.name: raw_supplies

nodes.description: Customer's lifetime spend before tax
nodes.label: lifetime_spend_pretax
nodes.name: lifetime_spend_pretax

nodes.description: Count of lifetime orders
nodes.label: count_lifetime_orders
nodes.name: count_lifetime_orders

nodes.description: LTV pre-tax / number of orders
nodes.label: average_order_value
nodes.name: average_order_value

nodes.description: Sum of total order amonunt. Includes tax + revenue.
nodes.label: order_total
nodes.name: order_total

nodes.description: New customer's first order count
nodes.label: new_customer_orders
nodes.name: new_customer_orders

nodes.description: Count of orders with order total over 20.
nodes.label: large_orders
nodes.name: large_orders

nodes.description: Count of orders.
nodes.label: orders
nodes.name: orders

nodes.description: Count of orders that contain food order items
nodes.label: food_orders
nodes.name: food_orders

nodes.description: Count of orders that contain drink order items
nodes.label: drink_orders
nodes.name: drink_orders

nodes.description: Sum of the product revenue for each order item. Excludes tax.
nodes.label: revenue
nodes.name: revenue

nodes.description: Sum of cost for each order item.
nodes.label: order_cost
nodes.name: order_cost

nodes.description: The median revenue for each order item. Excludes tax.
nodes.label: median_revenue
nodes.name: median_revenue

nodes.description: The revenue from food in each order
nodes.label: food_revenue
nodes.name: food_revenue

nodes.description: The revenue from drinks in each order
nodes.label: drink_revenue
nodes.name: drink_revenue

nodes.description: The % of order revenue from food.
nodes.label: food_revenue_pct
nodes.name: food_revenue_pct

nodes.description: The % of order revenue from drinks.
nodes.label: drink_revenue_pct
nodes.name: drink_revenue_pct

nodes.description: Percentage growth of revenue compared to 1 month ago. Excluded tax
nodes.label: revenue_growth_mom
nodes.name: revenue_growth_mom

nodes.description: Gross profit from each order.
nodes.label: order_gross_profit
nodes.name: order_gross_profit

nodes.description: The cumulative revenue for all orders.
nodes.label: cumulative_revenue
nodes.name: cumulative_revenue

nodes.description: Product dimension table. The grain of the table is one row per product.
nodes.label: products
nodes.name: products

nodes.description: Customer grain mart.
nodes.label: customers
nodes.name: customers

nodes.description: Order fact table. This table is at the order grain with one row per order.
nodes.label: orders
nodes.name: orders

nodes.description: Supplies dimension table. The grain of the table is one row per supply and product combination.
nodes.label: supplies
nodes.name: supplies

nodes.description: Location dimension table. The grain of the table is one row per location.
nodes.label: locations
nodes.name: locations

nodes.description: Items contatined in each order. The grain of the table is one row per order item.
nodes.label: order_item
nodes.name: order_item

nodes.description: Check that opened_at timestamp is properly truncated to a date.
nodes.label: test_does_location_opened_at_trunc_to_date
nodes.name: test_does_location_opened_at_trunc_to_date

nodes.description: Test that the counts of drinks and food orders convert to booleans properly.
nodes.label: test_order_items_compute_to_bools_correctly
nodes.name: test_order_items_compute_to_bools_correctly

nodes.description: Test that the counts of drinks and food orders convert to booleans properly.
nodes.label: test_supply_costs_sum_correctly
nodes.name: test_supply_costs_sum_correctly
